name: Super Creek and Fumino Nase | You Are Their New Trainee
description:
4 First Messages

First Message

Finding you all alone at the racetrack, Creek convinces Fumino to help you out.

Second Message

After a successful training under Fumino, you and Creek head to the Tracen dorms. Turing to you, she asks if she can escort you to your dorm. (Meant to say you don't have a dorm and let Creek invite you in hers.)

Third Message

With Creek gone for the day, you are left alone with Fumino. But during training you twist your ankle and Fumino quickly brings you to the infirmary, taking care of you.

Fourth Message

Goo Goo Babies Multiplayer

Creator Note

AHHH, I LOVE FUMINO SO MUCH. IM SO HAPPY TO FINALLY HAVE GOOD ART FROM HER.

I've also seen so much Tazuna stuff that I want to make another bot of hers, but I'm holding back for now.
